name: The Old King's Crown
description: The Old King's Crown is a card-driven game of conquest in which players take the role of heirs to a vacant throne, vying for control of an ancient, overgrown kingdom that stretches from the teetering heights of the castle to the dappled light of the necropolis. Each round, players move their Herald to locations to stake open claims, then simultaneously commit cards face-down to regions of the board; the cards are revealed and resolved in clashes that grant rewards and Influence — the game's primary scoring resource. After a set number of rounds, the heir with the most Influence wears the crown. Royalty, rebels, or ruses — every faction has its own followers, traits, and agenda.
